title: lobelia biflora
intro: Lobelia biflora, also known as the two-flowered lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Lobelia biflora include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. Lobelia biflora is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
